variants: Matija Vukovic is a licensed professional known for holding a Glyphwave Cartographer License. He completed his education at Umberwell Technical School, where he developed skills that propelled him into his career as a cartographer. Matija also contributes to the community as the Logistics Lead for Polaris Run Club, helping to organize events and activities for local enthusiasts. His work is not limited to physical maps; Matija has also published in Verdigris Room Editorials, sharing insights and innovations in mapping practices. Furthermore, he incorporates a working knowledge of Cree vocabulary into his projects, enhancing their cultural relevance.
